name: chr11_olfactory_cluster
description: Olfactory receptor (OR) gene clusters on chr11, the chromosome with the second-largest OR gene content (~150 functional OR genes across multiple clusters). The two largest sub-clusters are the chr11p15 telomeric cluster (~50 OR genes including OR51, OR52, OR56 subfamilies) and the chr11q11-q12 cluster (~60 OR genes from OR4, OR5, OR8, OR9, OR10 subfamilies). Intra-cluster identity 60-95%, with pockets of >98% identity in recent tandem duplicates. Both clusters intermix functional genes with pseudogenes.
expected_copy_count: ~150 functional OR genes across the chr11 clusters; CNVs of small sub-blocks segregate at population level
